title: doppler: put() classifies network errors as Backend instead of Unavailable
description: DopplerBackend::get (lib:87-105) correctly maps reqwest network errors to SecretError::Unavailable (transient). DopplerBackend::put (lib:~171) maps ALL errors to SecretError::Backend (permanent). A caller implementing a retry-on-Unavailable policy will retry get() but not put() on a transient network failure, silently losing the write. Bring put()'s error mapping in line with get()'s.
